title: Al Jazeera 'Bila Hudud' interview with Ahmad Mansour — Part 1
dateStatus: Broadcast/publication date verified (27 May 2015); filming/recording date unknown — not disclosed by broadcaster
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Name used in the programme: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani (أبو محمد الجولاني). The name Ahmad al-Sharaa was not used in this 2015 programme (confirmed in verification notes). The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
locationCertainty: Unknown — filming location not disclosed by Al Jazeera; not inferred from visual setting, reporting context, or references to Idlib
primarySourceStatus: Primary recording accessible — Arabic video (YouTube, Part 1)
transcriptStatus: Unofficial English translation available (access-restricted); no complete Arabic transcript located
evidenceSummary: A television interview broadcast on Al Jazeera Arabic in the programme 'Bila Hudud' (بلا حدود, 'Without Bounds'), conducted by journalist Ahmad Mansour (أحمد منصور). Part 1 was broadcast on 27 May 2015; Part 2 was broadcast on 3 June 2015 and is logged separately as S2015-006. The speaker is identified in the programme as Abu Muhammad al-Jolani, leader of Jabhat al-Nusra. The interview is in Arabic. The filming location is not disclosed by Al Jazeera and has not been inferred from the visual setting or contextual reporting. Core bibliographic facts — programme title, broadcaster, interviewer, broadcast date, speaker name used, and language — have been verified against the primary video and corroborating sources. An Arabic video recording (Part 1) is accessible on YouTube. An unofficial English-language translation (text PDF) is held in an Internet Archive item but is access-restricted (requires login) and its completeness has not been independently verified. No complete Arabic transcript has been located.

publicResearchNote: S2015-005 is the only record in the current Phase 1 candidate set that has been reviewed in the verification pass (2026-06-17). Core bibliographic facts have been verified: programme title ('Bila Hudud'), broadcaster (Al Jazeera Arabic), interviewer (Ahmad Mansour), broadcast date (27 May 2015), speaker name used in the programme (Abu Muhammad al-Jolani), and language (Arabic). The primary Arabic video recording (Part 1) is accessible on YouTube. Open items requiring further work: the filming location (not disclosed by broadcaster); a complete verified Arabic transcript (not located); independent verification of the completeness of the available English translation (the Internet Archive PDF is unofficial, access-restricted, and unverified for completeness). Part 2 (broadcast 3 June 2015) is a separate candidate record, S2015-006.
